x-enumeration-literals.name: Device Holder
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that receives and uses the issued device (e.g., debit card, payment card, or token).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issuing Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that issues the device to the customer and manages its activation, usage, and security.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or organization that accepts the device for transactions (e.g., payments for goods or services).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee the issuance and use of payment devices to ensure security, compliance, and consumer protection.
